_comment: RULESET: Protect staging — validates that main is healthy after every merge
HOW TO IMPORT:
GitHub → Settings → Rules → Rulesets → ▼ New ruleset → Import a ruleset
Upload this file.
WHEN TO USE THIS RULESET:
Use this ONLY if you maintain a dedicated 'staging' branch that is
separate from 'main'. If your project deploys to staging directly from
main (which is the default pipeline setup), you do NOT need this ruleset.
The staging-ci.yml workflow already validates main on every push.
WHAT THIS ENFORCES (on a 'staging' branch):
• No direct pushes — only merges from main (via PR) are allowed
• No force pushes
• No branch deletion
• Status check 'Staging Pipeline · Status' must be GREEN
• Requires 1 PR approval (owner only — same pattern as main)
BYPASS ACTORS:
Admin role, pull_request mode — owners can promote main → staging
without waiting for a separate review, but the staging CI gate must pass.
SETUP NOTES:
1. The 'integration_id: 15368' is the GitHub Actions app — do not change it.
2. The status check 'Staging Pipeline · Status' comes from staging-ci.yml.
It runs automatically when main receives a push.
3. Remove 'required_linear_history' if your team prefers merge commits.
name: Protect · staging
